highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Phonics Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Phonics Group of Institutions:

table.details: - Vodafone - Om Logistics Ltd - SIIDCUL - Bhagwanpur Industries Association

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at the Phonics University are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. PGI Haridwar courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Phonics Roorkee in the table provided below:

placements.overview: The Phonics University Placement report has been out in recent years, with more than 750 placement offers given to students at the Phonics University. The highest package and the average package stood at INR 26 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA, respectively. The placement rate achieved during the placement season was 80%. Over 700 companies participated in the Phonics University Roorkee placements 2024. Some of the top recruiters of the Institute are Genpact, Infosys, Accenture, Cognizant, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Phonics University offers a diverse range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Law, Computer Application, Business Management, and Commerce. At the UG level, the college offers various programmes such as BTech, BSc, BCA, BEd, BBA, BCom, BJMC, and many more.

faqs.answer: A:    Phonics Group of Institutions is one of the leading colleges in Haridwar to offer quality education to students in the field of Engineering, Computer Science, Pharmacy, etc. At the UG level, the college offers various programmes such as BTech, BSc, BCA, BEd, BBA, BCom, BJMC, and many more. The college offers a BTech programme to students for a duration of 4 years. The fees of BTech programme at PGI Roorkee ranges between INR 1.3 Lacs and INR 6.2 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the fees of Phonics Group of Institutions BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    Phonics Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates who have completed Graduation/Post graduation with 50% marks in any stream (that is, Arts, Science or Commerce) from any recognised Board / Council / University are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any stream Math/Biology/Arts/Commerce with above mentioned marks to be eligible.MBA/PGDMStudents of reserved category needs to score 45% marks in graduation.UG DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Thanking Phonics to make my future brighter. Satisfied by all the facilities provided.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed. The highest package offered by the college is 18 LPA whereas the minimum package offered is 2.4 LPA. Almost all the students got internships from my batch in several companies like HCL, TCS, Flipkart, Wipro, etc. Top roles offered in my course are software developer, ML engineer, data analyst, cyber security analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have computer labs, library, seminar hall, and projectors in classes which makes learning easier. Being a hosteler I would appreciate mess food and workers there who maintain proper hygiene and provide food much better than the other college hostels. Also, our canteen has various food options which are 24/7 available. Various sports and games are available like basketball, football, cricket, badminton, etc., in which anyone can participate their choice.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and provides good facilities .

review_content.Placements: Phonics Group of College is under Shri Dev Suman University. 65% of students in my college got placements. The average package for my college is 7 LPA with companies like Paytm and ISVR. Our college focuses on bridging the gap between academics and industry. Industrial visits are also conducted by our college. Students enjoy remarkable placement opportunities right after the graduation.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides top-tier infrastructure and a fostering environment. The campus has a free Wi-Fi facility. Our college provides a library with books, laboratories, and good classrooms that enhance the learning experience. Our college has fully equipped computer labs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This is a great platform to learn and enhance your skills and qualities for a better future.

review_content.Placements: Phonics Group of Institutions is a college under Shri Dev Suman University which helps the students to enhance their skills and knowledge for their better future. The placement cell of this college helps the students to get a good package as their perfect job. 68% of students were placed in many famous companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has attractive infrastructure like libraries with updated books, Wi-Fi facility, and properly well-furnished laboratories and classrooms. Our college has good facilities for hostel rooms, food, cleaning, etc. Sports and games are organized by the college for the students to maintain their physical health.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I'm very satisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students got placed in my course. The average package for my course is 7 LPA, with companies like Rubico, Paytm, ISVR, and many more recruiting. 70% of students got internships in my course, and industrial visits are also conducted for technical students.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has fully furnished classrooms, fully equipped computer labs, and a very well-organized library with books of all varieties. The campus has free Wi-Fi and CCTV security available to ensure safety, along with very well-qualified faculty to provide knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best college with the best campus.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students are getting placements in my college with good companies and good wages. The highest package is around 100,000. Top national and international companies come to provide placements; last time, a company from Canada placed 2-3 students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Wi-Fi is available in the libraries, which are well-furnished, and the classrooms are also nice. The labs have a good interior and provide efficient facilities. The canteen food is fresh and hygienic, and the sports ground is huge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I chose this course, B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, while the minimum was 2.3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Jio, Ambuja, Sopra, and Delhi Career Laboratory. The top roles offered are data analyst, data scientist, and junior software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. Wi-Fi is available for students, and the laboratories are well-maintained. Our classrooms are spacious, and there is a library with several books. Hostel facilities are average, and the food quality is decent. Medical facilities are also provided.

faqs.answer: Phonics Group of Institutions offers Degree and Diploma courses including 28 UG and 2 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Phonics Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Sc. specializations in Computer Science, Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Fisheries Science, Physics, Chemistry, UG Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Phonics Group of Institutions?
overview_faqs.answer: Phonics Group of Institutions (PGI) was established in 2009 and is located in Haridwar, Uttarakhand. Phonics Group of Institution courses are mainly offered to students in streams such as Engineering, Business Management, Commerce, Science, Computer Applications, Journalism, Hotel Management, etc. It is recognised by the UGC and offers AICTE-approved courses to students in full-time mode. Apart from this, the college also offers an excellent infrastructure to students.

overview_faqs.question: Is Phonics Group of Institutions worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Phonics Group of Institutions are B.Ed, B.Tech, B.Sc., BBA, M.Sc., BCA, B.Com, MBA/PGDM, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Phonics Group of Institutions has a rating of 4 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.2, 3.6, 4.1 and 4.2 as per reviews by students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure of Phonics University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees for courses differ from course to course. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Phonics University fee structure for some of the top courses is given in the following table:CoursesTotal tuition FeesBTechINR 1.1 lakh - INR 1.2 lakhMScINR 68,000BScINR 32,000 - INR 1.2 lakhBCAINR 82,000MBAINR 1.1 lakh - 1.2 lakhBEdINR 55,000BBAINR 72,000 - INR 82,000BComINR 32,000DPharmaINR 82,000

review_summary.college_name: Phonics University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Thanking Phonics to make my future brighter. Satisfied by all the facilities provided.

content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed. The highest package offered by the college is 18 LPA whereas the minimum package offered is 2.4 LPA. Almost all the students got internships from my batch in several companies like HCL, TCS, Flipkart, Wipro, etc. Top roles offered in my course are software developer, ML engineer, data analyst, cyber security analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have computer labs, library, seminar hall, and projectors in classes which makes learning easier. Being a hosteler I would appreciate mess food and workers there who maintain proper hygiene and provide food much better than the other college hostels. Also, our canteen has various food options which are 24/7 available. Various sports and games are available like basketball, football, cricket, badminton, etc., in which anyone can participate their choice.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and provides good facilities .

content.Placements: Phonics Group of College is under Shri Dev Suman University. 65% of students in my college got placements. The average package for my college is 7 LPA with companies like Paytm and ISVR. Our college focuses on bridging the gap between academics and industry. Industrial visits are also conducted by our college. Students enjoy remarkable placement opportunities right after the graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides top-tier infrastructure and a fostering environment. The campus has a free Wi-Fi facility. Our college provides a library with books, laboratories, and good classrooms that enhance the learning experience. Our college has fully equipped computer labs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This is a great platform to learn and enhance your skills and qualities for a better future.

content.Placements: Phonics Group of Institutions is a college under Shri Dev Suman University which helps the students to enhance their skills and knowledge for their better future. The placement cell of this college helps the students to get a good package as their perfect job. 68% of students were placed in many famous companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has attractive infrastructure like libraries with updated books, Wi-Fi facility, and properly well-furnished laboratories and classrooms. Our college has good facilities for hostel rooms, food, cleaning, etc. Sports and games are organized by the college for the students to maintain their physical health.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm very satisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: 65% of students got placed in my course. The average package for my course is 7 LPA, with companies like Rubico, Paytm, ISVR, and many more recruiting. 70% of students got internships in my course, and industrial visits are also conducted for technical students.
content.Infrastructure: My college has fully furnished classrooms, fully equipped computer labs, and a very well-organized library with books of all varieties. The campus has free Wi-Fi and CCTV security available to ensure safety, along with very well-qualified faculty to provide knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college with the best campus.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are getting placements in my college with good companies and good wages. The highest package is around 100,000. Top national and international companies come to provide placements; last time, a company from Canada placed 2-3 students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Wi-Fi is available in the libraries, which are well-furnished, and the classrooms are also nice. The labs have a good interior and provide efficient facilities. The canteen food is fresh and hygienic, and the sports ground is huge.

admission_overview.college_name: Phonics University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Phonics University admission 2025is currently ongoing on the official website of the university. The university offers various courses, such as BTech, BSc, BBA, MTech and many others under ten schools, including the School of Computer Science, Pharmacy, Nursing, and others. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Candidates get entrance-based admission to all UG, PG and diploma courses.Phonics Universitycarries out the application process in online mode. Read the following article to get a detailed breakdown ofPhonics Universityadmission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Phonics University admissionto all the courses is merit-based and entrance-based. The university offers an online mode of application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the university's official website. Candidates seeking admission can check out the table below for updated information related to thePhonics Universityeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

Phonics University admission process 2025has begun for all courses. The university offers entrance-based admission to all the courses. Candidates are required to fulfil the admission process of the university for seat allotment. Check below the Phonics University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Candidates searching for admission to Phonics University in any course are required to apply on the official website of the same.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Phonics University admission is entrance-based for all the courses. The university accepts various university, national-level and state-level entrance exam scores for admission to its UG, PG and diploma courses. Additionally, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e., pass Class 12 for admission to UG courses, pass UG degree for admission to PG courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

The university releases the merit list based on the scores in qualifying entrance exams. Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to submit a certain amount of thePhonics University feeto lock their seats.

Additionaly, they are required to complete a bachelor's degree in any discipline with 50-60% aggregate from a recognised board.

faqs.question: How can I get into Phonics Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Phonics Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates who have completed Graduation/Post graduation with 50% marks in any stream (that is, Arts, Science or Commerce) from any recognised Board / Council / University are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any stream Math/Biology/Arts/Commerce with above mentioned marks to be eligible.MBA/PGDMStudents of reserved category needs to score 45% marks in graduation.UG DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.

placement_data.title: Phonics University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement season 2024 for the Phonics University, Roorkee has come to an end. In all, more than 750 placement offers were made to students from various courses such as BTech, MBA, BCom, etc. The highest package reached INR 26 LPA during Phonics University placements. While the average package stood at INR 4.5 LPA. The placement rate achieved during the placement season was 80% . Over 700 companies are participating in the Phonics University, Roorkee placements drive and top recruiters such as Genpact, Infosys, Accenture, Cognizant , etc have made it to the list.

reviews.review_heading: Thanking Phonics to make my future brighter. Satisfied by all the facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: We have computer labs, library, seminar hall, and projectors in classes which makes learning easier. Being a hosteler I would appreciate mess food and workers there who maintain proper hygiene and provide food much better than the other college hostels. Also, our canteen has various food options which are 24/7 available. Various sports and games are available like basketball, football, cricket, badminton, etc., in which anyone can participate their choice.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and provides good facilities .
reviews.review_text: Our college provides top-tier infrastructure and a fostering environment. The campus has a free Wi-Fi facility. Our college provides a library with books, laboratories, and good classrooms that enhance the learning experience. Our college has fully equipped computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: This is a great platform to learn and enhance your skills and qualities for a better future.
reviews.review_text: Our college has attractive infrastructure like libraries with updated books, Wi-Fi facility, and properly well-furnished laboratories and classrooms. Our college has good facilities for hostel rooms, food, cleaning, etc. Sports and games are organized by the college for the students to maintain their physical health.

reviews.review_heading: I'm very satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: My college has fully furnished classrooms, fully equipped computer labs, and a very well-organized library with books of all varieties. The campus has free Wi-Fi and CCTV security available to ensure safety, along with very well-qualified faculty to provide knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with the best campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Wi-Fi is available in the libraries, which are well-furnished, and the classrooms are also nice. The labs have a good interior and provide efficient facilities. The canteen food is fresh and hygienic, and the sports ground is huge.

reviews.review_heading: I chose this course, B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Wi-Fi is available for students, and the laboratories are well-maintained. Our classrooms are spacious, and there is a library with several books. Hostel facilities are average, and the food quality is decent. Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college starts with college and finishes with future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very good in our college. Labs are very good and have the best facilities. Classrooms have only fans, not AC. The window view is very nice for students. Mess and canteen food is very expensive but delicious. Sports and games are conducted twice a year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it's worth to take admission according to the feels they charge.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and infrastructure are well-maintained, suitable for uninterrupted studies. Proper medical facilities and filtered water supply for students are also available. The library is helpful for students as they can borrow books they want to study with no charges.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our hostel was very good, neat, and clean. High security was available in the hostel. The quality of food served in the mess was good. Medical facilities, sports, and games were available. Many facilities like pure water aqua, libraries, labs, playground, halls, etc., were available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides different labs for every department. The mechanical department has a workshop. Our college provides a library for students to read books. Our college provides a separate hostel for boys and girls. Hostels are good. The food served in the hostel is good. Our college has sports playgrounds. Our college provides us with facilities for sports like cricket, football, basketball, and volleyball. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The Wi-Fi s...

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is great, and I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Wi-Fi is also available for students. Laboratories are well-maintained. Our classrooms are spacious. It also provides a library with several books. Hostel facilities are average. The food quality is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides decent infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were not up to mark. Wi-Fi is not available for all the students. Classrooms were not very clean. Food quality available in the canteen was decent. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is not up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience was not good because there are no placements in the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has all good facilities and infrastructure such as Wi-Fi, labs, library etc. The quality of the hostel is the best, and the food is not much good. The medical, sports and games facilities are good. The quality of facilities is good, but the placements are not good. The management lies about it.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are helpful, and the environment of the college is very positive.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college. The library is well organised, and all the books are available. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms cleanliness is the main objective of college. Wi-Fi facility is also available for students. Hostel food is very good, and medical facilities are also available. Cricket ground basketball court, football ground are also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities, faculty and scholarships provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college was established in 2000. It is a good place to build your future. Sports facilities are awesome, and students do participate. The library has many books. Smart classes are available. Medical facilities are very important, and so the doctor visits our college.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2019-20, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 1649 students were admitted at Shri Shivaji College of Arts, Commerce and Science and 665 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 665 students 10 were placed with median salary of INR 300000 and 220 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2020-21, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 838 students were admitted at Shri Shivaji College of Arts, Commerce and Science and 469 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 469 students 74 were placed with median salary of INR 500000 and 25 students opted for higher studies.

review_content.Placements: The college stated that during the admissions process, many MNC companies such as TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini conduct on-campus drives. But all placements are done off campus, and the college again charges fees for superset. The package offered is 3.5 to 4 LPA, which is off campus. The college helps create our LinkedIn ID and tells us to find internships on LinkedIn.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some facilities are good, but basic facilities like water, washrooms, and floor cleaning are not good. There is no Wi-Fi on campus; it is only for staff. The library is big; they have all the curriculum books. Hostel is only for girls, no boys. We have our own hostel gym and sports ground. Mess food comes in a variety of vegetarian and non-vegetarian options. The canteen is very bad.

review_content.Placements: College supports us to face off-campus placement drives. In on-campus, 1-2 companies are invited by the college. review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is good and facilities are also good. Drinking water shortage, no Wi-Fi are some problems. Library is big and good they have a big collection of books. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Emerging college with potential, but room for improvement.

content.Placements: 63% of students were in that course. Packages are around 1 LPA as the highest, 20,000 the lowest, and 45,000 average in my course. Kolhe Hospital. 15% of students got internships from this course and are still studying. Biochemist, doctor, plant doctor, animal doctor.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, Chemistry lab, Botany lab, and library were available. I used to visit my friend’s hostel and their food quality was good. There was no medical facility. We had sports and music but no games. We never played any games, got no time for playing games, and there wasn’t any period for games in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best Class College, with all.

content.Placements: In 2023, our B.Com. batch passed out with a placement rate of 75% of students. The average package offered was 11 LPA, and the highest package offered was 19 LPA in our course. The lowest salary package is 2.7 LPA. The recruiters are Mercedes, CapGemini, KPMG, and Microsoft. The junior students also got internships with a good stipend.
content.Infrastructure: The college is excellent with all its top-class facilities. The infrastructure is also good compared to other colleges. We have a large playground, gym, canteen, and seminar hall for our B.Com. branch. The hostel facilities are also top-class; they give a cot to sleep on and a cupboard to store all things. The washrooms are clean and maintain discipline.

The application forms are available online on the official website. Check below for more details on Shri Shivaji College of Arts, Commerce and Science admissions 2025.

reviews.review_text: Digital classrooms are available with 24X7 Wi-Fi connectivity. The library is also available 24X7. Labs are modern. Hostel facilities are only available for girls. A gym is also available. A total of one acre of ground is available for outdoor sports. Indoor sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in Akola.
reviews.review_text: The college campus was huge and had all the facilities required by students for proper studying. The library could accommodate 100 students at a time with a number of books.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for learning.
reviews.review_text: It provides a better environment for proper studies in different areas. College infrastructure like auditorium, canteen, parking, and further facilities are provided. It provides a library and open 7.00 AM to 7.00 PM. College conducted cultural events gathering.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my experience. It provides good chances of placements with required facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and overall arrangements were good, especially for the chemistry department. Separate laboratories for UG, PG, and research students were available. Wi-Fi and canteen facilities were also provided. Special and well-ventilated classroom facilities with separate seminar halls, and department library was also provided. Along with the department library, one main library facility was also available with all the required books.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied because of infrastructure and facilities and great placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and historical, and the entire campus is enabled with a great Wi-Fi facility with a speed of 1 Gbps, which is open always. Labs of every department are very advanced with all the facilities and all the equipment. Even in the classrooms, all the amazing lectures are conducted as they have high digital boards and good sitting arrangements. The most important thing is that the library named Shri Rajshri Shahu Maharaj has almost all the books related to...

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college provides about 25 Wi-Fi routers, huge library, 3 sections for each class and high tech labs for students. The college provides good facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: If your priority is to build a strong academic foundation at a low cost, this college is best.
reviews.review_text: Placements were average but slowly improving. Some students from ECE got placed in IT companies such as HCL, TCS, or Wipro. However, core electronics jobs were rare on campus. Most of us are prepared for off-campus drives or exams like GATE, SSC JE, or PSU recruitment.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Shivaji College is full of fun and lifelong memories.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was great. However, there was a shortage of labs, and when all students were in the lab, there was a shortage of computers.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement absolutely worth it.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is best good classroom and practical room took JEE as my parents forced me to do so firstly. I did not liked to go college but due to family pressure im still attending the class. No scholarships are alloted for open caste.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not good and also the college is not regular .
reviews.review_text:
The condition of the class romes is not so good due to there the worst benche s 
There is also no availability of any Wi-Fi connection 
The instruments present in lab are not properly working 
The food present in canteen are sold beyond the rate and also the food is tasteless .

reviews.review_heading: If you want to experience the best campus life with rude teachers, then take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Cultural activities are not allowed on our campus, but hostellers will have fests and hostel day celebrations.

Aspirants can also appear for Krupanidhi Scholarship Entrance Test (KSET) for admission. Selected aspirants are further called for group discussion and personal interview round for final selection.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission at Krupanidhi College of Management without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Krupanidhi School of Management (KSM) accepts the following admission test scores for admission to the MBA program:CAT (Common Admission Test)GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test)XAT (Xavier Aptitude Test)MAT (Management Aptitude Test)ATMA (AIM Test for Management Admission)CMAT (Common Management Admission Test)KMAT (Karnataka Management Aptitude Test). Candidate and performance in group interview and personal interview round will also be considered in the final selection process. For the most accurate and up-to-date information on the Krupanidhi School of Management MBA programme entrance exam results, it is recommended that you contact the KSM Admissions Office directly.

college_info.college_name: Krupanidhi College of Management Fees 2026

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of Krupanidhi School of Management must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at Krupanidhi School of Management is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Krupanidhi School of Management admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 6,30,000 - 8,15,000 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at Krupanidhi School of Management.

overview_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee at Krupanidhi School of Management?
overview_faqs.answer: The institution campus has separate hostels for boys and girls with AC and Non AC Rooms, but the fees structure of AC and Non AC is different AC is 52000 per semester and Non AC fees of the hostel is 40,000 per semester . The condition of the hostels is excellent and they also offer top quality food in mess rooms, they do a good job with keeping dorms clean enough.The AC hotels have slightly improved facilities compared to those without air conditioning

overview_faqs.question: How is college life at Krupanidhi School of Management?
overview_faqs.answer: Krupanidhi school of Management is one of the top business schools in Bangalore south India so it maintains his own decorum, they are providing the best to the students to give them a better college life. The campus is excellent and the dorms are maintained to a high standard. There's also excellent food in the cafeteria, and each department has its own library. Overall, the school is doing well, the students' environment is good, stress levels are moderate and placements are satisfactory.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about Krupanidhi School of Management?
overview_faqs.answer: The college was established in 2001 and is an integral part of the Krupanidhi group of institutions. The content of the course is unique, including artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning and data science all included in the curriculum. Industry internship for sharpening your understanding of the industry.

review_summary.college_name: Krupanidhi College of Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Marketing - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I love the way they train us by conducting daily tests.

content.Placements: You can get internships from your second year onwards. You get a lot of internship offers. You can prepare for them with the help of our college faculty. They will guide you on how to solve problems and encourage you through your tough times. You can get a placement offer starting from 3 years ending or 4th year starting onwards. The minimum percentage you should have to get placements is above 75%.
content.Infrastructure: College life can be very enjoyable and fun, especially for commerce students who can sometimes manage to pass exams by studying only on the last day. Many students have developed effective study habits that allow them to achieve good marks despite their last-minute preparation. Our college lacks some amenities. There is no nightlife around campus, no gym facilities available, and we have only a canteen for snacks. We also do not have a library or hostel accommodations. Our college hours are from 9:00 AM to 1:30 PM, after which we typically have to take tests before leaving for the day.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Human Resource - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with everything provided by the college.

content.Placements: In our course, many students are placed. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. There are many companies like Accenture, Saint Gobain, EY, HDFC, and SBI, which are the top recruiting companies. They offer a dual specialization course. Overall, the placements provided by them are good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities. Best things are the air-conditioned classrooms and Wi-Fi. Library is available, offering many books related to our course. Labs are also provided. Canteen offers good food, and stationery is available. Medical facilities are very good.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Krupanidhi College of Management.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students were placed. The highest package is 11 Lacs, and the average package is 3 Lacs. Around 70% of students got placed. Top recruiters are Accenture, EY, Flipkart, etc. Roles offered were marketing manager, sales manager, HR manager, tax analyst, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available are really good. The quality of food available is very good. We have good facilities like good Wi-Fi, labs, nice classrooms with a good atmosphere, and hostel facilities and surroundings are really good, nice, and attractive.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with amazing teachers.

content.Placements: 90+% students were placed in the course. The highest package was 11 Lacs, and the lowest was 3.5 Lacs. Top recruiters were Accenture, EY, Saintgobin, etc., and 60% of students got internships from the course in the years 2022-2024. Roles offered are tax analyst, sales manager, HR manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: High-quality infrastructure is available in the classrooms. WiFi facilities are also provided. The quality of hostel facilities is good. Canteen food is good. Extracurricular activities are highly promoted and given the required support. Medical facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a value for money .

content.Placements: About 90% of students got placed in the 2022-24 batch. The highest package offered was 11 Lacs, the lowest being 3.5 Lacs, and the average package was 6.5 Lacs. Top recruiters are Accenture, EY, HDFC, Saint Gobain, and Axis Bank. 80% of students were offered internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch with all the facilities, like Wi-Fi, a library with a good collection of books, and classrooms equipped with projectors and ACs. The hostel facilities are good, but the rooms are a little congested for 4 people sharing. Food is good at reasonable prices.

admission_process.title: Krupanidhi College of Management Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: KSM Bangalore offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores. Aspirants are further called for selection rounds for final admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in Krupanidhi School of Management:
KSM Bangalore Application Process 2026
The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to first register and then fill out the application form. Candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a course.
KSM Bangalore accepts scores of CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, KMAT, GMAT, KSET or ATMA exams for MBA followed by GDPI.
Seat Confirmation
Once the selection process is over, shortlisted aspirants are called with original documents for verification. Selected candidates need to pay theKSM Bangalore feeto confirm their seat in the school.

courses_data.name: Krupanidhi College of Management MBA Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, KMAT, Karnataka PGCET, CMAT, CAT, GMAT, KSET
courses_data.description: Krupanidhi College of Management offers a two-year full-time MBA programme in affiliation withBangalore North University. The course is approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and recognised by the Government of Karnataka. The duration of the MBA course extends over four semesters of 16 weeks or more each with a minimum of 90 actual working days of instruction in each semester and two to three weeks of examinations. Aspirants need to complete a bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregateare eligible to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: Which electives are offered in MBA at Krupanidhi College of Management?
faqs.answer: Krupanidhi College of Management offers a two-year MBA (Dual) programme. During the course, students need to opt for an elective. Below are the elective specialisations for MBA:FinanceMarketingHuman ResourcesLogistics & Supply Chain ManagementHealth care ManagementBanking Finance & Insurance Services Management (BFIS)Startups and SMES Management

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Krupanidhi College of Management MBA programme?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for Krupanidhi College of Management MBA programme. There is 5% relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates. Working professional or students in the final year of graduation are also eligible to apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: How many seats does KSM Bangalore have for its PGDM programme?
faqs.answer: Krupanidhi College of Management has a total seat intake of60for its PGDM programme. Candidates are admitted as per the sanctioned intake and performance in selection rounds. Additionally, the rules of reservation as per the state or central government may also get considered. It must be noted that the seat count mentioned here is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Krupanidhi College of Management entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Krupanidhi College of Management is both merit and entrance-based. The school conducts KSET for admission to MBA programme. Besides, the school also accepts national-level Management entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, GMAT or ATMA for admission to MBA programme. The selection for PGDM is also based on national-level entrance exam scores.

faqs.question: Can I join Krupanidhi College of Management directly?
faqs.answer: Candidates can join Krupanidhi College of Management for MBA based on CAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, etc. The institute conducts KSET or Krupanidhi Scholarship Entrance Test (KSET) for admission to MBA and scholarship to meritorious students. Selected candidates are further called for group discussion and personal interview round.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Krupanidhi College of Management?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to meet the eligibility requirements to apply for Krupanidhi College of Management Bangalore. The minimum qualification required to apply for PG courses is graduation. reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for MBA is too good and have hostels for both male and female. Wifi in all classrooms and a MBA oriented library is also there. Canteen is beautiful and have many items. The food quality and taste is good in canteen. Further have good sport grounds for different sports like football ground, volleyball ground, basketball ground.

reviews.review_heading: Placement,faculty are good
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available like we have Wi-Fi ,labs for all departments. Classroom are with proper ventilation and we have the library. The hostel is there for both boys and girls we have canteen, medical clinic is also there and sports facilities are also provided in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our campus, there are no hostels. But in the other locations, there are hostels with Wi-Fi connections. There are lab sections, projectors in every classroom, and a library with all the books you need to study and pass the exams. There is a great library.

reviews.review_heading: College is near and very clean.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life at Krupanidhi College is quite okay. However, in a city like Bangalore, hostels are not that much preferred. There is a restriction in the hostel after 8:30 pm, no students are allowed to go out, and if they do, they face consequences. The mess food is very good, and they serve a variety of cuisines, including North Indian, South Indian, Tibetan, and Chinese.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty of this University is very helpful.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 hostels for girls and 4 hostel buildings for boys. The hostel’s infrastructure is very nice and pretty. The rooms are very spacious. The first semester students are allotted triple sharing rooms while the third semester students have individual rooms. The mess food is tasty and cooked in a very hygienic manner. The menu of the mess changes every two weeks in a month. The registration process is very easy and it is done at the time of the admission.

reviews.review_heading: Krupindhi is very good college .
reviews.review_text: In this krupanidhi college there are many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs ,classroom, library so we have many facilities in this college. Therefore, everyone get nice experience in this college. Also, there are hostel facility  in college so krupanidhi is great.

reviews.review_heading: An ambient campus having good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The campus is such an ambient space in Bangalore. It's an ecofriendly green campus. The overall infrastructure of the campus is very facilitative. The classrooms are well furnished with fans, air conditioners and also comfortable seating arrangements. It's a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Sports and other extra curricular activities are there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a pleasant educational institution.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are very friendly and very down to earth. Their way of approaching the students are quite different and better than other colleges. As for the facilities. They have everything from a-z. You name it. And the students can depend on the institution.

reviews.review_heading: Better opportunity for the newcomers who would like to join this college .
reviews.review_text: We have facilities for our course like we have well library, classroom which has an attractive infrastructure. We have got good facilities like canteen, medical facilities. In games and sports we have all the required equipment. I am very excited to be student in this college .

reviews.review_heading: Good college for management field.
reviews.review_text:
There is a classical touch in the infrastructure and gives a nostalgic college life, the accommodation consist of hostel facility, fitness facility, food, sports and game etc.
The entire campus is entitled with technological aspects and provide better facilities .

college_info.college_name: Krupanidhi College of Management Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The institution campus has separate hostels for boys and girls with AC and Non AC Rooms, but the fees structure of AC and Non AC is different AC is 52000 per semester and Non AC fees of the hostel is 40,000 per semester . The condition of the hostels is excellent and they also offer top quality food in mess rooms, they do a good job with keeping dorms clean enough.The AC hotels have slightly improved facilities compared to those without air conditioning

Krupanidhi College of Management provides scholarships to meritorious students. The school considers the academic record, valid entrance exam score and performance of the aspirants in GD/ PI round for selection. The school conducts KSET or Krupanidhi Scholarship Entrance Test (KSET) for admission as well as scholarship.

Students need to fill out the KSET application form for Krupanidhi College of Management scholarship. Candidates need to register for the preferred course and then fill out the application form for KSET. The application fee to apply for KSM Bangalore is INR 1,000.

Krupanidhi College of Management conducts KSET or Krupanidhi Scholarship Entrance Test to offer scholarships to students. KSET includes 150 questions with 30 questions each in Language Comprehension, Data Analysis and Sufficiency, Mathematical Skills, Intelligence and Critical Reasoning and general knowledge section.

content.Placements: Minimum, there are 30% placements in my college. The highest package in my college is 5 LPA, and the lowest package in my college is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Mankind, Sunpharma, etc. Various students get placed in these companies.

content.Placements: There are 108 students in my batch. The average package of this college is 2.5 lacs; the lowest package is 2 lpa, and the highest is 4 lpa. There are many companies which visit the college every year, like Cipla, Mankind, Zenith, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and campus .

content.Placements: During the previous year and the current year, 58% students were placed. The package was offered on the basis of skills of student. Glenmark, cipla, Mylan, Felix were the top recruiters. Almost all of the 4th year students i.e., 89% got the internship at different places and got selected by the companies -MR, in QC, QA and production roles.
content.Infrastructure: This college is only for pharmaceutical education, so no other courses are available here like other universities. The labs, classroom, library and seminar hall available and well maintained. No hostel facilities are available in the campus. But the canteen is well maintained, and the medical room and sports are also available.

faqs.question: How can I get into Smriti College of Pharmaceutical Education for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Smriti College of Pharmaceutical Education has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics / Biology as optional subjects
Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate marks excluding grace marks.
Candidates completing 10+2 with grading system, should have grades equivalent to mentioned aggregate marks.M.PharmaCandidate must have completed Graduation in Pharmacy with above mentioned aggregate marks.
 The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 50% marks.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. overview_faqs.question: Is MCA at Al Falah University worth investing in?
overview_faqs.answer: Students enrolled in MCA at Al Falah University are exposed to real world training in the statutory four months Industrial Training of final semester MCA students conducted by the placement cell, as prescribed by the university. Renowned firms like BSNL, HCL, IBM, Barclays Bank, SnapDeal, VeeGee Industries etc. visit the university during placement drives. Regular job fairs are organized by the placement cell to improve employability. Al Falah University Placements have seen over 629 students opting for overseas assignments in the last two years.

review_summary.college_name: Al Falah University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: None of my friends got placements nor internships. The quality of education was also very bad. None of the teachers had coding skills. Only some of the other branches' students got placements and internships. I am not recommending this College for a coding background.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was there, but access to students was limited. They didn't allow students to use college Wi-Fi. The canteen of the College and Hostel was too bad. Food quality was low, but cleanliness was there. Students were not allowed to go outside from the hostel in the evening. Strict rules for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for students from middle-class families as its fee structure is low.

content.Placements: Because of Covid-19, companies stopped coming to college. That's why, the number of students in B.Tech is decreasing, but it's a very good university for medical students like MBBS and other medical courses. Medical students got placed in government hospitals and pharmacy companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it's improving day by day. There are many hostels available for students, and the size of the university is huge. They are increasing the number of seats per year, so more medical students can complete their studies.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This is a very good college to take the degree and students can enjoy themselves.

content.Placements: Around 55% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 7 LPA. The recruiting companies were Mahindra, Tata Motors, Yamaha, Pride consulting services, Apollo Tyres, etc. Almost all the students got internships from different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Library of this college was excellent, where every student can issue any book from it. Classrooms were very good and students will enjoy sitting and reading in these rooms. There were many courses so the laboratories were many in this college and they were in better condition. Hostal facilities were very good and available good quality food in the hostel. Canteen were two in this college, and medical facilities were available 24X7, because it was offered the medical course in this university.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is very good campus and everyone can enjoy yourself to being in this college.

content.Placements: 1. 60% students are placed in our course. 2. The highest package is 12 Lacs, medium is 8 Lacs and lower package is 4 Lacs annual. 3. Top recruiting companies are Mahindra, Tata Motors, and Maruti Suzuki. 4. Above 55% of students are got internships.
content.Infrastructure: In our college the facilities are available like it have their own medical College and hospital, hostal for students, canteen, two playing grounds. It have fully Wi-Fi connection, labs and excellent library service and all the books and patterns of books are available in the library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the facilities, but the teaching level is good.

content.Placements: My senior Mr Kalam Azad passed out last year got selected for an interview. The placement facilities are good, but it depends on a student that observed from teachers. Overall, the placements are in an average condition, and in all the things.
content.Infrastructure: Studies are okay, but the labs and practicals are low in condition because a lab is the most important part of engineering. They have poor facilities in labs and practicals. Everything is available, but the teachers do not take responsibility.

admission_overview.title: Al Falah University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Al Falah University admission 2025 is now open for diploma, undergraduate, postgraduate and doctorate programmes. Admission process for the university is both entrance based and merit based. The university also accepts national level entrance exam scores such as NEET UG/NEET PG etc. Al Falah University offers up to 80 courses with specialisation in the domains of Engineering, Computer Science, Physical & Molecular Sciences, Medical science, Commerce & Management and Education. The admission process offers an option between both online and offline application and involves eligibility verification and application fee payment.

eligibility_selection.title: Al Falah University Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: For most of the courses offered by the university, selection is merit based. Students having a minimum of 45- 50 % aggregate in Class 12 are eligible for most courses except Medical programmes. MBBS and MD/MS require qualification of NEET UG and NEET PG. Minimum qualification for under graduation and post graduation is completion of Class 12 and graduation, respectively. faqs.answer: Yes, hostel facility is available for BTech students at Al Falah University. faqs.question: How much percentage is required for admission to Al Falah University?
faqs.answer: For BCA and B Tech, a minimum of 45% of aggregate marks is required for admission on the basis of merit to the university. For all other courses except MBBS, a minimum of 50% of aggregate marks is required for admission on the basis of merit to the university.For post-graduation, all Al Falah University Courses except MD/MS, require a minimum of 50% of aggregate marks for admission on merit basis to the university.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations offered under PhD and eligibility at Al Falah University?
faqs.answer: Al Falah University offers a doctorate programme for students who are eligible for the same. The common eligibility is a second class master degree with not less than 55% marks of a university or a grade 'B' in the UGC 7- point scale. Alternatively, the candidate must complete M.Phil course work with at least than 55% marks of a university or a grade 'B' in the UGC 7- point scale and may, upon completion pursue Phd in the same subject from the same institution. Following specialisations are offered underPhDat Al Falah University:·PhD Mechanical Engineering·PhD Social Sciences·PhD Civil Engineering·PhD Electrical Engineering·PhD Electronics and Communication Engineering·PhD Computer Science and Engineering·PhD Education·PhD Physical and Molecular Sciences·PhD Humanities and Languages·PhD Commerce and Management·PhD Computer Science

faqs.question: How do I confirm admission at Al Falah University?
faqs.answer: To confirm admission at Al Falah University, the shortlisted student are invited for document verification and are required to pay a cumulative of the annual course fee, one-time payment of college security and the hostel fee. Hereafter, the applicant's admission is confirmed and the student receives his/her ID Card and welcome documents.

hostel_campus.college_name: Al Falah University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University’s hostel rooms are spacious and well equipped with a separate bed, study table, cupboards, Almirah etc. for every student. Spacious common rooms, reading room, medical room, transport facilities, news and TV Room and Wi-Fi facilities are provided in the hostels. Besides, various indoor/ outdoor games facilities are provided to students.

library.description: Al-Falah University’s Library has a collection of about 4000 books and now its collection reached up to 62703 of books, 18000 titles and 62 collections of digital periodical content. The Library provides a facility of DELNET so as to the students and faculty members of the College can obtain books from other libraries on loan basis through DELNET. The Library is fully automated on Library Software Nettlib. Besides, the Library also made Book bank facility available to the students on nominal payment basis of an entire semester.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was there, but access to students was limited. They didn't allow students to use college Wi-Fi. The canteen of the College and Hostel was too bad. Food quality was low, but cleanliness was there. Students were not allowed to go outside from the hostel in the evening. Strict rules for students.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for students from middle-class families as its fee structure is low.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it's improving day by day. There are many hostels available for students, and the size of the university is huge. They are increasing the number of seats per year, so more medical students can complete their studies.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college to take the degree and students can enjoy themselves.
reviews.review_text: Library of this college was excellent, where every student can issue any book from it. Classrooms were very good and students will enjoy sitting and reading in these rooms. There were many courses so the laboratories were many in this college and they were in better condition. Hostal facilities were very good and available good quality food in the hostel. Canteen were two in this college, and medical facilities were available 24X7, because it was offered the medical course in this university.

reviews.review_heading: It is very good campus and everyone can enjoy yourself to being in this college.
reviews.review_text: In our college the facilities are available like it have their own medical College and hospital, hostal for students, canteen, two playing grounds. It have fully Wi-Fi connection, labs and excellent library service and all the books and patterns of books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the facilities, but the teaching level is good.
reviews.review_text: Studies are okay, but the labs and practicals are low in condition because a lab is the most important part of engineering. They have poor facilities in labs and practicals. Everything is available, but the teachers do not take responsibility.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college where if you have passion to read you can do.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and have good infrastructure. There are many hostels; they are good, but the rooms are small. The food is nutritious. There is a nearby hospital where, if someone is injured, they can be followed to the hospital. There are more than 20 teachers in each department.

reviews.review_heading: In the final year, a few companies and startups visit our campus.
reviews.review_text: Our university provides a well-furnished room with a study table, three chairs, and a Wi-Fi connection. They provide books and a library that is open 24 hours a day. Well-prepared food is served in the canteen. It is clean and hygienic. Sports have a separate section.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.review_text: There is a small canteen with unhygienic food. University itself runs that canteen but management is zero. Classes are held in fields and there's no proper infrastructure. The building looks like a 100 years old building. Water is leaking from many floors.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good campus in all aspects, and is also good for further study.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. The infrastructure is good, and we also have a good sports club. Teachers are available for sports, music, dance, singing, etc. A recent registration and affiliation are taken in medical courses such as MBBS nursing, biotechnology, laboratory, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Students who want to study and gain knowledge, I recommend joining AL Falah University.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is excellent. The college provided with all the amenities like water and doctors on each floor to students. There are clean and well-maintained restrooms available. There are high-end classrooms with projectors. Moreover, each class has adequate seating capacity.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome to My Al Falah University.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure at least college compound is in 63 acres. As Al Falah university has many classrooms and has hostel as well as an apartment for faculty which will be provided to the faculty by the institute and Al Falah university has its own hospital in which they take care of several patients of local areas.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good university on low budget.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and hostel. The canteen is good outside the university, there is nothing, but nearby Delhi and the nearest metro is Raja Nahar Singh Bullabghar, Delhi, which is around 30 km away, and by road you can reach in 45 minutes by metro you can reach in approximately 2 hours.

college_info.college_name: Dr. D.Y. Patil Institute of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Dr. D.Y. Patil Institute of Pharmacy Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr. D.Y. Patil Institute of Pharmacy is an institute which offers various courses at UG level. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as D.Pharma. The fee structure for the Dr. D.Y. Patil Institute of Pharmacy programmes is around INR 12,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the quality of education offered by the institute and I suggest it to every student.

review_content.Placements: Our batch got placement In GeBBS Healthcare, Tata Consultancy, Wockhardt Pharma. About 90 percent of the students were placed in the campus, with an average salary of annual 1.4 lacs per annum, and raging from 1.2 LPA to 2.0 LPA. The above companies visited our college and offered us the posts of junior QA officer, junior production officer, medical coding person, etc. The college does not provide any internship from college side.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has well-equipped laboratories with well-qualified teaching staff. The college has the facility for Wi-Fi, sports & gaming. The labs of the college have advanced equipment and adequate apparatus for students. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and sound system. A canteen is available in the college with an average quality of food. The college has a good hostel facility. We have not faced any infrastructure related issues during our tenure at the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It was very good because of the campus, function, faculty members, etc.

review_content.Placements: The maximum academic percentage score was 94%, and the minimum academic percentage score was 50%. The highest salary offered for the fresher by hospital pharmacy was Rs. 16,000 per month. Many companies like Cipla, GSK, Mankind, Glenmark, etc., visited our college for placements. I don't know about the salaries offered to students of our course. Students who scored 60% of the marks also got jobs in the hospital pharmacy with their good nature, good general knowledge and hard work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had the awesome surroundings with the perfect management, and our college also provided high-speed Wi-Fi, best experimental labs, best classrooms and awesome library. I actually didn't stay in the hostel but I heard from hostelers that the food served here, security and cleaning were very good.

reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with the faculty and facilities of our college.

review_content.Placements: In our college placements, 5 students got placed in our course. Tata consultancy services, and Capgemini were the top companies that came to our college for recruitment. The highest salary package that was offered is 5lLPA, the lowest package is 2LPA and the average package is 3LPA. In our college, nearly 50% Of students got internships. Students will get placed with off-campus opportunities during their last year
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus was not equipped with a Wi-Fi connection. The classrooms, library, and labs were good. The food available in the canteen was good, but it was expensive. The college is not very nice to choose from. The hostel and the college are both located somewhere in different locations, and the college is not provided with good facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the placements and there is no proper education system.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements, lecturers, faculty, and labs. There is no proper facility and college management attracts you by saying free college fees and that they will provide scholarships but they will never help once you get the admission. Many students are stuck with this.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for the engineering students and no proper food. They charge Rs.70,000 for the hostel but there is no food, proper rooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and proper classrooms. A good library is available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are a bit helpful and qualified and their teaching quality is not at all good. The pass percentage is 50%. Some of the teachers who have completed their Ph.D. are countable. They act to be too strict but not proper.

overview_faqs.question: Is Karavali Group of Colleges a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Karavali Group of Colleges is a reputed institute for B.Sc., UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, B.Ed, B.P.Ed, B.A.M.S., B.Tech, BHM, Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Design, Hospitality & Travel, Business & Management Studies, Engineering, Teaching & Education, Science, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Karavali Group of Colleges has a review rating of 2.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.5 on campuslife, 2.2 on placements, 2.7 on faculty and 1.9 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Karavali Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, bad placements in 2023.

content.Placements: In our college, there were 70 students in our graduating class. Of those, one of my friends got a 4.7 LPA package and went on to work as a software engineer at LG Soft. Others went to startups and some went to foreign countries to pursue higher education.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the classrooms but it is available in the labs. The quality of the labs is good and the college canteen is the best thing about the college. We had a lot of fun there. A little more improvement is needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied due to lack of faculty and not proper classes are held.

content.Placements: Some students got placed in IT industry with the lowest salary package. Wipro, Infosys etc. are the companies visit for placement. Around 99% of students completed internships at different companies like Airobosoft Pvt limited, Zyfer Manglore and many. Designing and software development are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure for labs, classrooms, and library. Some are staying in government hostels and some are in college hostel. Food is not bad at hostel and good medical facilities. In government hostel food is not so expected but still getting every facility provided by government.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with the faculty and facilities of our college.

content.Placements: In our college placements, 5 students got placed in our course. Tata consultancy services, and Capgemini were the top companies that came to our college for recruitment. The highest salary package that was offered is 5lLPA, the lowest package is 2LPA and the average package is 3LPA. In our college, nearly 50% Of students got internships. Students will get placed with off-campus opportunities during their last year
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was not equipped with a Wi-Fi connection. The classrooms, library, and labs were good. The food available in the canteen was good, but it was expensive. The college is not very nice to choose from. The hostel and the college are both located somewhere in different locations, and the college is not provided with good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the placements and there is no proper education system.

content.Placements: There are no placements, lecturers, faculty, and labs. There is no proper facility and college management attracts you by saying free college fees and that they will provide scholarships but they will never help once you get the admission. Many students are stuck with this.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for the engineering students and no proper food. They charge Rs.70,000 for the hostel but there is no food, proper rooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and proper classrooms. A good library is available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are a bit helpful and qualified and their teaching quality is not at all good. The pass percentage is 50%. Some of the teachers who have completed their Ph.D. are countable. They act to be too strict but not proper.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members.

content.Placements: Some companies visit the campus selection to select the eligible students from the computer science and electronics, and communications branches. In this college, only software companies visited in the previous year. Due to the COVID-19, there were no campus placements in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a hospital on the campus. It provides all facilities. The canteen is available, and it serves a variety of food. Sports are conducted by the university yearly.
content.Faculty: In the electronics and communication department, all faculty members are highly qualified. They do not show an attitude to the students. They are friendly, and they explain concepts easily to understand students. Semester exams are not difficult to pass because we study in internal exams. Our branch has 8 faculty members. They are awesome, and we can easily understand the syllabus.

KCP courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection ofKota College courses:
Kota College of Pharmacy admission process includes registration and RUHS entrance exam or direct admission. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in KCP:
STEP 1: Kota College of Pharmacy Application Process 2024
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. However, the candidate can also download the application form from the official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Admission to KCP will be through entrance examination to be conducted by Rajasthan University of Health Sciences, Jaipur or Direct Admission
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.
