review_content.Placements: 80% of students get placed in the company. The highest package was 10 LPA and the lowest was 1 LPA. Product-based companies come for placement, like Infosys, Adrika Enterprises, etc. 60% of students get into big companies. Developer and project manager are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is totally clean and anti-ragging. Classrooms are so big and fully comfortable. All books are available in the library. Hostel facilities are also available on the campus itself. Hostel food is just so good. There are also so many activities to enjoy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A great note of our college THE RKDF UNIVERSITY RANCHI WHERE A GREAT STUDY AVAIL.

review_content.Placements: The starting salary for the lower package is 300,000 rupees per annum, while the higher package amounts to 2.1 million rupees per annum. Companies such as Wipro, Infratech, and several others offer these packages. Numerous students secured internships this year with companies like Wipro, Infosys, Infratech, and many more. These students consistently prioritize their studies and successfully accomplish their goals.
review_content.Infrastructure: All subjects are equipped with laboratories, and we have a well-furnished classroom and library with Wi-Fi access, among other facilities. Additionally, all faculties have access to mess and medical services, among others. The teachers strive to excel in their profession and contribute to the progress of the nation. They work diligently to support their families and achieve the best outcomes.

faqs.answer: At RKDF University Ranchi students are offered a three-year undergraduate degree in Bachelor of Business Administration across several specialisations. The interested candidates who want to get admission to the BBA programme offered at the university need to have cleared Class 12 or its equivalent from any stream with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board to be eligible for the BBA programme.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for BBA course at RKDF University, Ranchi?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can get direct admission in RKDF University Ranchi as the university offers admissions to students for its offered undegraduate, postgraduate, diploma programmes on the basis of merit obtained by them in the qualifying examination for the relevant courses. However, for the PhD programme offered at the university, the candidates need to clear the entrance exam along with appearing for an interview round. Those with valid scores in relevant exams will be exempted from the entrance test for the doctorate programme.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to RKDF University, Ranchi?

faqs.answer: Yes, RKDF University is a good university and is one of the renowned universities, located in Ranchi. It is a highly prestigious college, recognised by the state government, and is also a member of AIU (Association of Indian Universities). The university offers UG and PG courses across Management, Science, and Arts streams. These courses are designed to provide students with the necessary skills and knowledge for their chosen field. RKDF University, Ranchi also offers great infrastructural facilities to its students such as lecture halls, conference halls, laboratories, a library, and hostels.
faqs.question: Q: Is RKDF University, Ranchi good?

faqs.answer: RKDF University Ranchiuniversity offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate and Diploma programmes such as BA, BSc, BCom, MCA, MSW, PGDM, DPharma, MBA and more in multiple streams such as Management, Engineering, Arts, Science, etc. The university admission is done on merit-basis and also offers PhD in several courses. Further, the college offers programmes in regular mode and in full time mode. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme must be graduated with atleast 50 % from a recognised university.
faqs.question: Q: How can I take admission at RKDF University Ranchi?

faq_section.heading: FAQs
faq_section.introduction: Students can choose from various course options available at RKDF University, Ranchi. Admission is offered based on merit or entrance exam scores of the candidates. The table below provides an overview of the programmes offered, along with their tuition fees and the necessary qualifications for enrollment:

answer.text: At RKDF University Ranchi students are offered a three-year undergraduate degree in Bachelor of Business Administration across several specialisations. The interested candidates who want to get admission to the BBA programme offered at the university need to have cleared Class 12 or its equivalent from any stream with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board to be eligible for the BBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA course at RKDF University, Ranchi?

answer.text: Yes, you can get direct admission in RKDF University Ranchi as the university offers admissions to students for its offered undegraduate, postgraduate, diploma programmes on the basis of merit obtained by them in the qualifying examination for the relevant courses. However, for the PhD programme offered at the university, the candidates need to clear the entrance exam along with appearing for an interview round. Those with valid scores in relevant exams will be exempted from the entrance test for the doctorate programme.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to RKDF University, Ranchi?

answer.text: Yes, RKDF University is a good university and is one of the renowned universities, located in Ranchi. It is a highly prestigious college, recognised by the state government, and is also a member of AIU (Association of Indian Universities). The university offers UG and PG courses across Management, Science, and Arts streams. These courses are designed to provide students with the necessary skills and knowledge for their chosen field. RKDF University, Ranchi also offers great infrastructural facilities to its students such as lecture halls, conference halls, laboratories, a library, and hostels.

faqs.question: Is RKDF University, Ranchi good?

answer.text: RKDF University Ranchiuniversity offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate and Diploma programmes such as BA, BSc, BCom, MCA, MSW, PGDM, DPharma, MBA and more in multiple streams such as Management, Engineering, Arts, Science, etc. The university admission is done on merit-basis and also offers PhD in several courses. Further, the college offers programmes in regular mode and in full time mode. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme must be graduated with atleast 50 % from a recognised university.

faqs.question: How can I take admission at RKDF University Ranchi?

answer.text: RKDF University Ranchi offers over twenty five programmes in several streams such as Arts, Science, Commerce and Management. The below-mentioned table contains the total tuition fee for some of the popular courses provided at RKDF University Ranchi:Course NameTotal Tuition Fee (Investment)BAINR 72,000BScINR 96,000 - INR 2.1 lakhBA LLBINR 2 lakhBTechINR 3.6 lakhUG DiplomaINR 20,000 - INR 80,000BBAINR 2.1 Lacs - INR 3 lakhMBAINR 2.8 lakhMCAINR 1.9 lakhBMCINR 1.5 lakhBSWINR 1.2 lakhMComINR 60,000

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for the courses offered at RKDF University, Ranchi?

answer.text: The total duration of the BBA programme offered at RKDF University Ranchi is three years. The course is divided into six semesters of six months each. The university offers BBA in Hotel Management and BBA in Corporate along with BBA (gen). The total tuition fee of the BBA programme offered at RKDF University ranges between INR 1.7 Lacs - INR 3 lakh. For further details regarding the BBA programme, the students can click here.

faqs.question: What is the duration and fee of the BBA course offered at RKDF University, Ranchi?

answer.text: Students will have to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 (INR 2,000 for the PhD programme) at the time of submitting the application form. Those seeking offline applications will have to pay the fee at the time of purchasing the form from the admissions office, while those filling out the application online will have to pay the fee at the end of filling out the form to successfully submit the application form.

review_summary.college_name: RKDF University, Ranchi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: RKDF university Ranchi review .

content.Placements: On average, 50 percent of total students were placed in this college and the highest package is 5 lacs, the lowest package is 2 lacs, and the average is just 2.50 lacs. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Byju's, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good for studying, the library is good and our college provides all the books students need. Wi-Fi is also available at this college, and the classrooms are also very good and large. Our college are also provides hostel for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: RKDF UNIVERSITY RANCHI review .

content.Placements: On average, 50 percent of students are placed in the college every year. The highest package is 5 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies in this college are Tata, Byju's, Bright Code, and many more. Seventy percent of students got internships at Bright Code.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in this college, and labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are very good and clean, and the library is well-stocked with all the books needed for study. The hostel facilities are good, and sports are also played.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: RKDF University, Ranchi is the best college for those who want a good environment.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed in the company. The highest package was 10 LPA and the lowest was 1 LPA. Product-based companies come for placement, like Infosys, Adrika Enterprises, etc. 60% of students get into big companies. Developer and project manager are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is totally clean and anti-ragging. Classrooms are so big and fully comfortable. All books are available in the library. Hostel facilities are also available on the campus itself. Hostel food is just so good. There are also so many activities to enjoy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great note of our college THE RKDF UNIVERSITY RANCHI WHERE A GREAT STUDY AVAIL.

content.Placements: The starting salary for the lower package is 300,000 rupees per annum, while the higher package amounts to 2.1 million rupees per annum. Companies such as Wipro, Infratech, and several others offer these packages. Numerous students secured internships this year with companies like Wipro, Infosys, Infratech, and many more. These students consistently prioritize their studies and successfully accomplish their goals.
content.Infrastructure: All subjects are equipped with laboratories, and we have a well-furnished classroom and library with Wi-Fi access, among other facilities. Additionally, all faculties have access to mess and medical services, among others. The teachers strive to excel in their profession and contribute to the progress of the nation. They work diligently to support their families and achieve the best outcomes.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Hotel Management - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best in the city for hotel management course with best placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: The college provides about 100% placements. The highest salary offered is Rs.25000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs.15000 per month. Top recruiting companies Leela, Hyatt, Reliance, Vivanta, etc. Every student has to complete internships. It will be provided by the university itself or if you have any choice or any connections then you can go. The university will give you offer in Jaypee hotels, Leela Radisson, etc. If you want to know about HM, you can google it.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate classrooms for seniors and juniors. All departments labs are available and library is also provided. All labs are good and well-equipped with the latest equipment according to the industry needs. The hostel is good and you can rate it 3/5. Mess facilities are provided. All indoor and outdoor games, CCTV facilities, and separate hostel for boys and girls in our college. There are always guards around the hostel gate.

admission_overview.college_name: RKDF University, Ranchi Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility & Selection Process

paragraphs: RKDF University Ranchi admissionis done on merit-basis. The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma programmes such asBA,BSc,BCom,MCA,MSW,PGDM,DPharma,MBAand more in multiple streams such as Management, Engineering, Arts, Science, etc. The university also offers PhD in several courses.RKDF University Ranchioffers the programmes in regular mode. Students can submit the application form in both offline and online modes. RKDF University Ranchi is recgonised by UGC.

RKDF University Ranchi accepts students to all of its programmes on the basis of academic merit achieved in past qualifying exams. All of the courses at are offered at RKDF University Ranchi are through regular mode. Find below the key highlights forRKDF University Ranchi admissions:

RKDF University Ranchi feevaries depending on the programme selected by the student. The overall tuition fee of the university ranges between INR 30,000 to INR 3.6 lakh. This doesn’t include the exam and hostel fee. The students have to pay one-time admission fee of INR 5,000 that is non-refundable and an exam fee of INR 1,500 per semester. The below-mentioned table contains the total tuition fee for the courses provided at RKDF University Ranchi:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

RKDF University Ranchi admission process includes several steps. The college offers admissions to its programmes on merit-basis and accepts the admission forms in both offline and online modes. Interested candidates can visit the official website of RKDF University Ranchi to obtain the application form. Below is the step-wiseadmission process of RKDF University Ranchi:
Step 1: RKDF University Ranchi Application Process

Eligible candidates can buy the admission form from admission offices of the university by paying INR 1,000. Alternatively, application form can also be downloaded from the RKDF University Ranchi official website. The duly filled in application form with black/blue ink in Capital Letters without overwriting along with the Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favor of RKDF University Ranchi payable at Ranchi should be sent to the admission office.
Step 2: Selection Process
Once the registration is done, the candidates who fulfill the eligibility will be shortlisted on merit-basis.
Step 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the candidates are shortlisted, they will be contacted by the college for counselling. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to BTech course at RKDF University, Ranchi without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to the BTech programme offered at RKDF University Ranchi without appearing for any entrance exam as the university accepts admissions on the basis of academic merit obtained by the students in Class 12 or its equivalent in Science stream from a recognised board. The university doesn't require you to appear for any entrance exam for its BTech programme.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations offered for BTech at RKDF University, Ranchi?
faqs.answer: RKDF University Ranchi offers BTech programme at the undergraduate level. Students are accepted on the basis of merit secured by them in Class 12 in Science stream. The university offers the BTech degree across the following specialisations:BTech in Mining EngineeringBTech in Mechanical EngineeringBTech in Civil EngineeringBTech in Computer Science & EngineeringBTech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering

faqs.question: What is the fee for the BTech programme at RKDF University, Ranchi?
faqs.answer: RKDF University Ranchi offers the BTech programme to students across several specialisations. The total tuition fee of the BTech programme offered at the university ranges between INR 2.8 Lacs and INR 3.6 Lacs depending on the specialisation selected. The students also have to pay a one-time admission fee of INR 5,000 that is non-refundable and an exam fee of INR 1,500 per semester. For further details and queries regarding TFW, students can contact the admission office of the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to RKDF University, Ranchi?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get direct admission in RKDF University Ranchi as the university offers admissions to students for its offered undegraduate, postgraduate, diploma programmes on the basis of merit obtained by them in the qualifying examination for the relevant courses. However, for the PhD programme offered at the university, the candidates need to clear the entrance exam along with appearing for an interview round. Those with valid scores in relevant exams will be exempted from the entrance test for the doctorate programme.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at RKDF University, Ranchi without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: RKDF University accepts students to its UG, PG and Diploma programmes on the basis of merit obtained by them in the relevant qualifying exam. However, those seeking admissions in the PhD programmes offered at the university, must clear the entrance exam followed by an interview. Those who have cleared UGC/ CSIR/ National or State level fellowship or cleared GATE/GPAT/SLET/NET shall be exempted from PhD entrance test. For further details, candidates can contact the admission office of the university.

faqs.question: Are RKDF University Ranchi admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, RKDF University Ranchi admissions for the academic year 2024-2025 are open and currently ongoing. The university offers UG, PG, Diploma and Phd degrees in a wide range of programmes spanning over several specialisations. Interested candidates can visit the official website of the college to apply for the desired programme. Alternatively, students can also download the application form and submit it to the admissions office in person.

reviews.review_heading: RKDF university Ranchi review .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good for studying, the library is good and our college provides all the books students need. 
Wi-Fi is also available at this college, and the classrooms are also very good and large.
Our college are also provides hostel for the students.

reviews.review_heading: RKDF UNIVERSITY RANCHI review .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in this college, and labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are very good and clean, and the library is well-stocked with all the books needed for study. The hostel facilities are good, and sports are also played.

reviews.review_heading: RKDF University, Ranchi is the best college for those who want a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus is totally clean and anti-ragging. Classrooms are so big and fully comfortable. All books are available in the library. Hostel facilities are also available on the campus itself. Hostel food is just so good. There are also so many activities to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: A great note of our college THE RKDF UNIVERSITY RANCHI WHERE A GREAT STUDY AVAIL.
reviews.review_text: All subjects are equipped with laboratories, and we have a well-furnished classroom and library with Wi-Fi access, among other facilities. Additionally, all faculties have access to mess and medical services, among others. The teachers strive to excel in their profession and contribute to the progress of the nation. They work diligently to support their families and achieve the best outcomes.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best in the city for hotel management course with best placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are separate classrooms for seniors and juniors. All departments labs are available and library is also provided. All labs are good and well-equipped with the latest equipment according to the industry needs. The hostel is good and you can rate it 3/5. Mess facilities are provided. All indoor and outdoor games, CCTV facilities, and separate hostel for boys and girls in our college. There are always guards around the hostel gate.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty good here with good condition of living. Seniors are more supportive than expected, so you will get very much support from them. There's no ragging environment also. Our college has good Wi-Fi with a minimum speed of 7 Mbps. Classrooms are pretty huge. The library has a good collection and a good number of books, and you can complete the entire subject without purchasing books.

reviews.review_heading: It is not very good but an average university.
reviews.review_text: It has advanced computer labs and a decent library. There is average food in the hostel. It is generally considered good, with nutritious and hygienic food being provided. It also provides a library, hostel, transport, canteen, cafeteria, playground, and indoor games. It has a Wi-Fi campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good helpful teachers but be ready to hustle for law-specific placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not too good but average. I did not live in the hostel but the classroom is good. Some have digital boards. In my university, all facilities are available like moot courts for practical learning, auditorium, seminar hall, playground, etc. College also provides canteen and food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good choice. I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average. It is outside the college campus but within walking distance. So that's a plus point. You will get food from the college mess. It's good like homemade well-cooked food. You will be provided with a variety of food options. The labs and classrooms are spacious. The college has Wi-Fi. The canteen food is great.

The college is covered with lush greenery and provides several facilities to students. Further, the college campus facilitates students with separate accommodation for girls and boys. ASCI campus also offers sports and games activities for the students like billiards, swimming, chess, tennis, badminton, table tennis, and others.
